name: Gunja
usesInAyurveda: Tridoshic Modulation: Pacifies Vata and Kapha.
mainMedicinalUses: Used specifically for hair growth and scalp infections.
Assists in neurological pains in very small doses.
plantProfile: Red and black seeds are highly toxic if not purified.
preparationMethods: Seeds must be boiled in cow's milk for 3-6 hours (Shodhana).
safetyProfile: RAW SEEDS ARE DEADLY POISONOUS. NEVER USE WITHOUT EXPERT PURIFICATION.
